summary: Planned Phase 2b (MCP Integration) — 9 tasks adding 6 graph tools (query_graph, search_similar, find_context_for, get_relationships, get_impact, ingest_source) and 3 resources (harness://graph, harness://entities, harness://relationships) to the MCP server.
pending: Task 1: Add graph dependency to mcp-server
Task 2: Implement query_graph and search_similar tools
Task 3: Implement find_context_for and get_relationships tools
Task 4: Implement get_impact and ingest_source tools
Task 6: Register tools and resources in server.ts
Task 7: Write tests for graph tools
Task 8: Write tests for graph resources
concerns: MCP tools receive project path as input — graph loading from .harness/graph/ must be lazy and handle missing graph gracefully
Tools modify different sections of the same file (tools/graph.ts) — sequential, not parallel
MCP server uses dynamic import pattern for core — may need same for graph
decisions: All 6 tools go in one file (tools/graph.ts) to keep graph concerns co-located
All 3 resources go in one file (resources/graph.ts)
Shared loadGraphStore helper avoids duplicate loading logic
ingest_source tool serves as the MCP equivalent of harness scan
